location_precision.why: Every one of the six findings carries a usable file:line (e.g. 'src/sync.py:14', 'src/report.py:11').

interaction_synthesis.why: The sync.py:39 finding mechanistically links two defects: the bare except swallows the failure while 'the ID was already appended to `seen`' (line 24's dedupe), so the failed user is never retried or reported.

causal_clarity.why: Every finding states a mechanism, e.g. floor division 'drops the final partial page, so 250 staged rows fetch only 200' and NULL emails 'raises AttributeError ... aborting report generation mid-file.'
